title: CPUC Opens Rulemaking on Long-Term Gas Planning
summary: R.24-09-012 initiates a comprehensive review of California's gas distribution system future under decarbonization mandates.

title: SB 1221 Neighborhood Decarbonization Zones — CPUC Implementation
summary: Commission designates 151 priority zones for gas-to-electric transition pilots under SB 1221 framework.

title: PG&E 2027 GRC — Phase I Discovery Underway
summary: TURN engaged in active discovery on distribution capital expenditure proposals exceeding $10B over the rate cycle.

title: Value of Environmental Surveillance for Pandemic Response
summary: New RAND study (co-authored) quantifies the benefit-cost case for wastewater and environmental biosurveillance networks.

title: California Heat Pump Adoption Accelerates as Gas Costs Rise
summary: CEC data shows heat pump water heater installations up 42% YoY as gas utility rates hit record highs for residential customers.

title: FERC Order 1920 — Long-Term Transmission Planning
summary: Final rule requires transmission providers to conduct long-term scenario planning, with significant implications for Western grid buildout.
